title: 音符盒钢琴notePiano
description:
替换木板、羊毛、荧石、黏土和金块五种乐器的音色为钢琴，荧石右击6下的音高为中央C，音高从左往右升高，每个乐器采样间距一个八度。
Replace the timbres of five instruments—wood planks, wool, glowstone, clay, and gold blocks—with piano.
body:
替换木板、羊毛、荧石、黏土和金块五种乐器的音色为钢琴，荧石右击6下的音高为中央C，音高从左往右升高，每个乐器采样间距一个八度。如两个右击次数都为12的音符盒，垫块分别是荧石和黏土，那么黏土被激活时发出的声音比荧石高一个八度。
Replace the timbres of five instruments—wood planks, wool, glowstone, clay, and gold blocks—with piano. The pitch of glowstone after six right-clicks is middle C. The pitch increases from left to right, and the sampling interval between each instrument is one octave.For example, if two note blocks both have 12 right-clicks, and the blocks beneath them are glowstone and clay respectively, then the sound produced by the clay when activated is one octave higher than that of the glowstone.
